text:
Created attachment 243573
Screenshot of Application Launcher

(In reply to Florian Walpen from comment #0)

> … no shutdown, reboot or sleep buttons in the app launcher or elsewhere. …

Not reproducible here. 

I have six options in Application Launcher: 

Lock
Log Out
Switch User
Sleep
Restart
Shut Down


% pkg iinfo sddm
plasma5-sddm-kcm-5.27.6
sddm-0.20.0
sddm-freebsd-black-theme-1.3
